raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad nu Juhda uhs Miz-
a pee tahs Tukfneses nahze/
D greeſahs tee prett teem Pul-
em/ un raugi/ tur bija Mirro-
/ kas pee Semmes gulieja/ un
weens bija iſbehdsis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nahze Josawats un
inna Laudis un aplaupija
hs/ un atradde pee teem tik
nds Mantas/ un Drehbes/ nu
hrgus Rihkus/ un atnebine
m to/ tif daudſka tee wairak
warreja nest/ un tee iſdallija
Lauptjumu trihs Deenas/ jo
r bija tohti dauds.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un zettortâ Deenâ fapul-
ahs tee Teikſchanas~Geleijâ/
tur teize tee to KUNGU/ ta-
hz noſauze tee tahs paſchas
eetas Wahrdu Teikſchanas-
leijn/ lihdsſchodeen.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz greesehs ifkatrs no
hda un Jeruſalemes atpak-
/ un Josawats winan Preek-
â/ ka tee us Jeruſalemi eetu
Preeku/ jo tas KUNGS bij
nnus preezius darrijs pahr
aan Eenaidneefeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee nahze uhs Jerusa-
t ar Sohma-Stabulehin/ un
klehm/ nn Trummmetehm us
KUNGA Namnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Deewa Bailschana
hee pahr wiſtahm Semmes
alstiſtahm/ kad tee dsirdeja/
tas KUNGS bij prett Isra-
Eenaidneefeem karrojis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta bija Josawata Wal-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta waldija Josawats
pahr Juhdu/ wiꞥſch bija trihs-
definitis un peezus Gaddus wezz/
kad tas par Rehninu tappe/ un
waldija diwideſmits peezus Gad-
dus Jeruſalemê/ un winna Mah-
tei bija Asuba Wahrdn/ Silka
Meita.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch staigaja eekſch
fawa Tehwa Affus Zelteem/ un
ne atſtahje no teem/ darridams/
kas tam KUNGAM patikke.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tatſchu tee Augstumi ne
tappe nopohstit/ jo tee Laudis
ne bij wehl tawu Sirdi pee fawo
Tehwo Deewu pastahwigu tai-
fijcht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kas wehl no Josawa-
ta Leetahm atleeſ/ tik labbi tahs
pirnas ka tahs pehdejas/raugt/
tahs irr rakſtitas eekſch Jeüsa
Anana Dehla Stahsteem/ ko
wiꞥſch irr farakſtijs eekſch to I-
sraëta Rehninu Grahmatas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un pehz to apbeedrina-
jahs Josawats tas Rehninsch no
Juhda ar Akasiju to Israëta
Rehninu/ tas turrejahs besdee-
wigt eekſch funveem Darbeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch faderreja ar to
leelas Latwas darriht us Juhru
braukt/ un tee darrija leelas Lat-
wag Ezeon-Gaberâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Eeliesers/ Dodawa
Dehls nno Maresas/ fluddinaja
prett Josawatu Praueetchu
Mahzibu/ fazzidams: Tadeht ka
tu ar Akasiju effi apbeedrinates/
tad
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
